name: regression_analysis_all_variants
description: Run regression analysis between rRNA variants and human phenotypes

inputSpec.name: chunk
inputSpec.help: A value representing the chunk to process.

inputSpec.name: regression_type
inputSpec.help: A value representing the type of the regression model.

inputSpec.name: control_type
inputSpec.help: A value representing the type of the control cohort.

outputSpec.help: Array of all output files generated by the job
